articles.title_en: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
articles.title_ru: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
articles.preview_en: In areas devastated by the twin earthquakes, people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.

articles.title_en: The AI jobs debate just got messier
articles.title_ru: The AI jobs debate just got messier
articles.preview_en: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

articles.title_en: What If Russia Asks Kazakhstan for Fuel?
